# UX Checklist: Provide Clear Error Messages for Invalid Inputs

**Purpose**: Validate error presentation in UI (if applicable).
**Created**: 2026-03-11
**Feature**: `specs/032-invalid-input-errors/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/prompts:speckit.checklist` workflow.

## Error Presentation

- [ ] CHK-UX-001 Error display shows field-level corrections. Note: Not necessary for core spec; UI surface optional per UC-32.
- [ ] CHK-UX-002 Redacted values are shown without exposing sensitive data. Note: Not necessary for core spec; UI surface optional per UC-32.

## Consistency & Accessibility

- [ ] CHK-UX-003 Labels align with shared naming conventions ("Validation error", "Field", "Correction"). Note: Not necessary for core spec; UI surface optional per UC-32.
- [ ] CHK-UX-004 Basic accessibility pass (keyboard navigation + contrast) is part of UX gate. Note: Not necessary for core spec; no required UI.
